description_long: This object is a classic flip-style mobile phone with a clamshell design, featuring a large black screen on the upper half and a flat keypad area on the lower half. The exterior back is a deep blue color and includes a small rectangular secondary display and a circular camera lens below it. The hinge mechanism is visible on the sides, allowing the phone to open and close along its horizontal axis. The front face is dominated by the main display, with a speaker grille above it. The phone's body appears to be made primarily of plastic with some metallic and glass elements, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A blue and black flip-style mobile phone with a large main screen, secondary back display, and a single rear camera. The clamshell design features a visible hinge and a compact, durable build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main black screen and speaker grille above it, with the phone open.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hinge mechanism and the slim profile of the open phone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue exterior, a small secondary display, and a circular camera lens below it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hinge and the phone's thickness when open.
attribute_screen_display_content: The main screen appears blank or turned off, with no visible icons, wallpaper, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single circular camera lens is located on the back, centered below the secondary display.
attribute_button_layout: None visible; the keypad is implied but not detailed in the open lower half.
